source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mummy Pig.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: This is Daddy Pig.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 dik1 gung1 zok3
cards.english: [Mummy Pig's Work]

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 豬太太用佢部電腦做緊嘢
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 jung6 keoi5 bou6 din6 nou5 zou6 gan2 je5
cards.english: Mummy Pig is working on her computer.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 豬先生就整緊湯做午餐
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 zau6 zing2 gan2 tong1 zou6 ng5 caan1
cards.english: Daddy Pig is making soup for lunch.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 爹哋呀，我哋可唔可以睇下 媽咪用電腦做嘢啊？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 aa1 ngo5 dei6 ho2 m4 ho2 ji5 tai2 haa6 maa1 mi4 jung6 din6 nou5 zou6 je5 aa3
cards.english: Daddy, can we watch Mummy using the computer?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 可以，不過你唔好阻住佢喎
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 bat1 gwo3 nei5 m4 hou2 zo2 zyu6 keoi5 wo3
cards.english: Yes, but don't disturb her.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 佢今日有好多重要嘢要做啊
cards.jyutping: keoi5 gam1 jat6 jau5 hou2 do1 zung6 jiu3 je5 jiu3 zou6 aa3
cards.english: She has a lot of important things to do today.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: do1 ze6 de1 dei6
cards.english: Thank you, Daddy.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 豬太太有好多重要嘢要做啊
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 jau5 hou2 do1 zung6 jiu3 je5 jiu3 zou6 aa3
cards.english: Mrs. Pig has a lot of important things to do.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 媽咪，George同我可唔可以坐喺你大髀？
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 tung4 ngo5 ho2 m4 ho2 ji5 co5 hai2 nei5 daai6 bei2
cards.english: Mommy, can George and I sit on your lap?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: mong6 zyu6 nei5 zou6 je5 aa3
cards.english: And watch you work?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: hou2 ngaak6 daan6 nei5 dei6 jiu3 zing6 di1 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: Okay, but you have to be quiet.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: Peppa同George 好鍾意望住豬太太用電腦做嘢
cards.jyutping: tung4 hou2 zung1 ji3 mong6 zyu6 zyu1 taai3 taai2 jung6 din6 nou5 zou6 je5
cards.english: Peppa and George love to watch Mrs. Pig use the computer to work.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 媽咪，我哋可以玩 嗰個電腦遊戲開心雞嗎？
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 waan2 go2 go3 din6 nou5 jau4 hei3 hoi1 sam1 gai1 maa1
cards.english: Mommy, can we play the Happy Chicken computer game?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 我哋一陣間先再玩開心雞啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 jat1 zan6 gaan1 sin1 zoi3 waan2 hoi1 sam1 gai1 laa1
cards.english: We'll play Happy Chicken later.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 ji4 gaa1 jiu3 zou6 je5 aa3
cards.english: I need to work right now.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 ngo5 dei6 bong1 nei5 zou6 je5 aa1
cards.english: Mommy, let us help you with work.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 aa3
cards.english: No, Peppa.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: nei5 m4 ho2 ji5 dim6 bou6 din6 nou5 gaa4
cards.english: You can't touch the computer.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 仲有George，你都一樣唔可以掂部電腦啊
cards.jyutping: zung6 jau5 nei5 dou1 jat1 joeng6 m4 ho2 ji5 dim6 bou6 din6 nou5 aa3
cards.english: And George, you can't touch the computer either.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 nei5 m4 ho2 ji5 gam2 zou6 gaa4
cards.english: Yes, George, you shouldn't do that.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: ting4 aa3
cards.english: Peppa, stop!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3
cards.english: Mommy, I'm sorry.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 我只係想示範畀George睇唔應該噉做咋
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi2 hai6 soeng2 si6 faan6 bei2 tai2 m4 jing1 goi1 gam2 zou6 zaa3
cards.english: I was just demonstrating to George that he shouldn't do that.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 弊喇，部電腦似乎壞咗喎
cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3 bou6 din6 nou5 ci5 fu4 waai6 zo2 wo3
cards.english: Oh dear, the computer seems to be broken.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 aa3
cards.english: Daddy!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6
cards.english: Dad!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: me1 si6 aa3 maa1 mi4
cards.english: What's the matter, Mom?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 爹哋啊，你可唔可以幫我整返佢啊？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 aa3 nei5 ho2 m4 ho2 ji5 bong1 ngo5 zing2 faan1 keoi5 aa3
cards.english: Dad, can you help me fix it?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 你而家整電腦，我就幫你煮午餐吖
cards.jyutping: nei5 ji4 gaa1 zing2 din6 nou5 ngo5 zau6 bong1 nei5 zyu2 ng5 caan1 aa1
cards.english: While you fix the computer, I'll make you lunch.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: gam2 hou2 laa1 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Okay, Mom.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 但係我電腦唔係好叻㗎喎
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ngo5 din6 nou5 m4 hai6 hou2 lek1 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: But I'm not very good at computers.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: hou2 do1 ze6 nei5 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Thank you so much, Dad.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 豬先生準備整返好部電腦喇
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 zeon2 bei6 zing2 faan1 hou2 bou6 din6 nou5 laa3
cards.english: Mr. Pig is getting ready to fix the computer.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: dang2 ngo5 si3 haa6 sik1 zo2 bou6 din6 nou5
cards.english: Let me try turning off the computer.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: jin4 hau6 zoi3 hoi1 faan1 keoi5 laa1
cards.english: And then turn it back on.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 豬先生整返好部電腦喇！
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 zing2 faan1 hou2 bou6 din6 nou5 laa3
cards.english: Mr. Pig fixed the computer!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: sai1 lei6 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Awesome, Daddy.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 係啊，我諗我係呢方面嘅專家嚟啊
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 ngo5 nam2 ngo5 hai6 ne1 fong1 min6 ge3 zyun1 gaa1 lai4 aa3
cards.english: Yeah, I think I'm an expert in this area.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 爹哋，我哋可以玩 嗰個電腦遊戲開心雞嗎？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 ngo5 dei6 ho2 ji5 waan2 go2 go3 din6 nou5 jau4 hei3 hoi1 sam1 gai1 maa1
cards.english: Daddy, can we play that computer game Happy Chicken?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 我諗你應該問下媽咪先
cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 nei5 jing1 goi1 man6 haa6 maa1 mi4 sin1
cards.english: I think you should ask Mommy first.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 媽咪話我哋一陣間可以玩㗎
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 waa6 ngo5 dei6 jat1 zan6 gaan1 ho2 ji5 waan2 gaa4
cards.english: Mommy said we can play in a little while.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: jyu4 gwo2 hai6 gam2 hou2 laa1
cards.english: If that's the case, okay.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 我唔知隻遊戲碟喺邊喎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 zi1 zek3 jau4 hei3 dip6 hai2 bin1 wo3
cards.english: I don't know where the game disc is though.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5
cards.english: Great!

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: gan1 zyu6 dou3 ngo5 laa3
cards.english: Then it's my turn.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: gam1 ci3 leon4 dou3 ngo5 laa3
cards.english: It's my turn this time.

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.jyutping: soeng6 bin6 dou3 dai2 zou6 mat1 gam3 cou4 ne1
cards.english: What's all the noise upstairs?

cards.source: Cantonese Peppa Pig Subs - S1E7 Mummy Pig at Work［豬太太的工作］
cards.characters: 睇嚟部電腦已經整返好喇喎
cards.jyutping: tai2 lai4 bou6 din6 nou5 ji5 ging1 zing2 faan1 hou2 laa3 wo3
cards.english: Looks like the computer is fixed.
